2605.01123.title: PERSA: Reinforcement Learning for Professor-Style Personalized Feedback with LLMs
2605.01123.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) can provide automated feedback in educational settings, but aligning an LLMs style with a specific instructors tone while maintaining diagnostic correctness remains challenging. We ask how can we update an LLM for automated feedback generation to align with a target instructors style without sacrificing core knowledge? We study how Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) can adapt a transformer-based LLM to generate programming feedback that matches a professors grading voice. We introduce PERSA, an RLHF pipeline that combines supervised fine-tuning on professor demonstrations, reward modeling from pairwise preferences, and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), while deliberately constraining learning to style-bearing components. Motivated by analyses of transformer internals, PERSA applies parameter efficient fine-tuning. It updates only the top transformer blocks and their feed-forward projections, minimizing global parameter drift while increasing stylistic controllability. We evaluate our proposed approach on three code-feedback benchmarks (APPS, PyFiXV, and CodeReviewQA) using complementary metrics for style alignment and fidelity. Across both Llama-3 and Gemma-2 backbones, PERSA delivers the strongest professor-style transfer while retaining correctness, for example on APPS, it boosts Style Alignment Score (SAC) to 96.2% (from 34.8% for Base) with Correctness Accuracy (CA) up to 100% on Llama-3, and Gemma-2. Overall, PERSA offers a practical route to personalized educational feedback by aligning both what it says (content correctness) and, crucially, how it says it (instructor-like tone and structure).
2605.01123.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）可以在教育環境中提供自動化反饋，但在保持診斷正確性的同時，將LLMs的風格與特定教師的語調對齊仍然具有挑戰性。我們詢問如何更新LLM以生成自動化反饋，使其與目標教師的風格對齊，而不犧牲核心知識？我們研究如何通過人類反饋的強化學習（RLHF）來調整基於Transformer的LLM，以生成與教授評分風格相匹配的編程反饋。我們介紹PERSA，一個RLHF管道，結合了對教授示範的監督微調、基於成對偏好的獎勵建模和近端策略優化（PPO），同時故意限制學習於具有風格特徵的組件。受到Transformer內部分析的啟發，PERSA應用參數高效的微調。它僅更新頂部Transformer塊及其前饋投影，最小化全局參數漂移，同時提高風格可控性。我們在三個代碼反饋基準（APPS、PyFiXV和CodeReviewQA）上評估我們提出的方法，使用互補的風格對齊和保真度指標。在Llama-3和Gemma-2骨幹上，PERSA在保持正確性的同時，提供了最強的教授風格轉移，例如在APPS上，它將風格對齊分數（SAC）提高到96.2%（從基礎的34.8%），在Llama-3和Gemma-2上正確性準確度（CA）達到100%。總體而言，PERSA提供了一條實用的個性化教育反饋路徑，通過對齊它所說的內容（內容正確性）以及關鍵的表達方式（類似教師的語調和結構）。
2605.01123.author: Ravi Ranjan et.al.
2605.01123.authors: Ravi Ranjan, Utkarsh Grover, Xiaomin Lin, Agoritsa Polyzou
